languages.text: {n}Тело магоса вздрагивает. Движущая сила вспышкой проходит сквозь аугментированную руку, плавит выступивший из железного плеча изолят. Стоящие рядом техножрецы подхватывают обмякшего Экзальта-177 и поспешно уносят его в госпиталь.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Тело магоса вздрагивает. Движущая сила вспышкой проходит сквозь аугментированную руку, плавит выступивший из железного плеча изолят. Стоящие рядом техножрецы подхватывают обмякшего Экзальта-177 и поспешно уносят его в госпиталь.{/n}

languages.text: {n}The Magos's body jolts as the Motive Force sparks through his augmented arm, melting the isolate protruding from his metal shoulder. The nearby Tech-Priests prop up his sagging form and convey him hurriedly him to the infirmary.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Тело магоса вздрагивает. Движущая сила вспышкой проходит сквозь аугментированную руку, плавит выступивший из железного плеча изолят. Стоящие рядом техножрецы подхватывают обмякшего Экзальта-177 и поспешно уносят его в госпиталь.{/n}

languages.text: {n}贤者的身躯猛地一震，源力火花掠过他加装了植入物的手臂，将他肩部突出的绝缘部件熔化。附近的技术神甫们扶住他瘫软的身躯，匆匆将他送往医务室。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The Magos's body jolts as the Motive Force sparks through his augmented arm, melting the isolate protruding from his metal shoulder. The nearby Tech-Priests prop up his sagging form and convey him hurriedly him to the infirmary.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}贤者的身躯猛地一震，源力火花掠过他加装了植入物的手臂，将他肩部突出的绝缘部件熔化。附近的技术神甫们扶住他瘫软的身躯，匆匆将他送往医务室。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Le corps du magos est pris de soubresauts lorsque la Force Motrice traverse son bras augmenté, en faisant fondre l'isolant fiché dans son épaule de métal. Les technoprêtres qui travaillaient à ses côtés l'attrapent avant qu'il ne s'effondre et l'emmènent en toute hâte à l'infirmerie.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The Magos's body jolts as the Motive Force sparks through his augmented arm, melting the isolate protruding from his metal shoulder. The nearby Tech-Priests prop up his sagging form and convey him hurriedly him to the infirmary.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Le corps du magos est pris de soubresauts lorsque la Force Motrice traverse son bras augmenté, en faisant fondre l'isolant fiché dans son épaule de métal. Les technoprêtres qui travaillaient à ses côtés l'attrapent avant qu'il ne s'effondre et l'emmènent en toute hâte à l'infirmerie.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Devinim Gücü, Magos'un ogmentli kolundan kıvılcımlar saçıp metal omzundan dışarı taşan yalıtkanı eritiyor. Tekno Rahip'in tüm vücudu sarsılıyor. Yakındaki Tekno Rahipler, onun kendini bırakan bedenini düşmekten kurtarıp alelacele revire götürüyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The Magos's body jolts as the Motive Force sparks through his augmented arm, melting the isolate protruding from his metal shoulder. The nearby Tech-Priests prop up his sagging form and convey him hurriedly him to the infirmary.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Devinim Gücü, Magos'un ogmentli kolundan kıvılcımlar saçıp metal omzundan dışarı taşan yalıtkanı eritiyor. Tekno Rahip'in tüm vücudu sarsılıyor. Yakındaki Tekno Rahipler, onun kendini bırakan bedenini düşmekten kurtarıp alelacele revire götürüyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}El cuerpo del magos se sacude mientras la Fuerza Motriz atraviesa su brazo aumentado, derritiendo el aislante que sobresale de su hombro metálico. Los tecnosacerdotes cercanos cargan con su cuerpo flácido y lo transportan apresuradamente a la enfermería.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The Magos's body jolts as the Motive Force sparks through his augmented arm, melting the isolate protruding from his metal shoulder. The nearby Tech-Priests prop up his sagging form and convey him hurriedly him to the infirmary.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}El cuerpo del magos se sacude mientras la Fuerza Motriz atraviesa su brazo aumentado, derritiendo el aislante que sobresale de su hombro metálico. Los tecnosacerdotes cercanos cargan con su cuerpo flácido y lo transportan apresuradamente a la enfermería.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Der Körper des Magos zuckt, als die Antriebskraft in seinen augmentierten Arm fährt und diesen bis zu seiner metallenen Schulter schmelzen lässt. Die umstehenden Techpriester eilen herbei, um ihn zu stützen, ehe sie ihn eilig zur Krankenstation führen.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The Magos's body jolts as the Motive Force sparks through his augmented arm, melting the isolate protruding from his metal shoulder. The nearby Tech-Priests prop up his sagging form and convey him hurriedly him to the infirmary.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Der Körper des Magos zuckt, als die Antriebskraft in seinen augmentierten Arm fährt und diesen bis zu seiner metallenen Schulter schmelzen lässt. Die umstehenden Techpriester eilen herbei, um ihn zu stützen, ehe sie ihn eilig zur Krankenstation führen.{/n}

languages.text: {n}マゴスの身体が、動機付けの力によって強化された腕を通り、金属の肩から突き出た孤立した部分を溶かし、近くのテクプリストが彼の垂れ下がった姿を引き立て、急いで彼を療養所へ運んだ。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The Magos's body jolts as the Motive Force sparks through his augmented arm, melting the isolate protruding from his metal shoulder. The nearby Tech-Priests prop up his sagging form and convey him hurriedly him to the infirmary.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}マゴスの身体が、動機付けの力によって強化された腕を通り、金属の肩から突き出た孤立した部分を溶かし、近くのテクプリストが彼の垂れ下がった姿を引き立て、急いで彼を療養所へ運んだ。{/n}
